mapper.select: SELECT CASE_ID AS "caseId", OWNER_ACTOR_ID AS "ownerActorId", DATASET_ID AS "datasetId", DATASET_NAME AS "datasetName", SECTION_CODE AS "sectionCode", CASE_CODE AS "caseCode", MAJOR_CODE AS "majorCode", LCI_MAJOR_CODE AS "lciMajorCode", LCI_MAJOR_LABEL AS "lciMajorLabel", LCI_MIDDLE_CODE AS "lciMiddleCode", LCI_MIDDLE_LABEL AS "lciMiddleLabel", LCI_SMALL_CODE AS "lciSmallCode", LCI_SMALL_LABEL AS "lciSmallLabel", SECTION_LABEL AS "sectionLabel", SOURCE_FILE_NM AS "sourceFileName", SOURCE_PATH AS "sourcePath", TARGET_PATH AS "targetPath", CASE_STATUS AS "caseStatus", ROW_COUNT AS "rowCount", ROW_SCHEMA_JSON AS "rowSchemaJson", GUIDANCE_JSON AS "guidanceJson", LAST_SAVED_BY AS "lastSavedBy", TO_CHAR(LAST_SAVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "savedAt" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE ORDER BY MAJOR_CODE, SECTION_CODE, CASE_CODE

SELECT CASE_ID AS "caseId", OWNER_ACTOR_ID AS "ownerActorId", DATASET_ID AS "datasetId", DATASET_NAME AS "datasetName", SECTION_CODE AS "sectionCode", CASE_CODE AS "caseCode", MAJOR_CODE AS "majorCode", LCI_MAJOR_CODE AS "lciMajorCode", LCI_MAJOR_LABEL AS "lciMajorLabel", LCI_MIDDLE_CODE AS "lciMiddleCode", LCI_MIDDLE_LABEL AS "lciMiddleLabel", LCI_SMALL_CODE AS "lciSmallCode", LCI_SMALL_LABEL AS "lciSmallLabel", SECTION_LABEL AS "sectionLabel", SOURCE_FILE_NM AS "sourceFileName", SOURCE_PATH AS "sourcePath", TARGET_PATH AS "targetPath", CASE_STATUS AS "caseStatus", ROW_COUNT AS "rowCount", ROW_SCHEMA_JSON AS "rowSchemaJson", GUIDANCE_JSON AS "guidanceJson", LAST_SAVED_BY AS "lastSavedBy", TO_CHAR(LAST_SAVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "savedAt" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE WHERE CASE_CODE = #{caseCode} AND OWNER_ACTOR_ID = #{ownerActorId} AND LCI_MAJOR_CODE = #{lciMajorCode} AND LCI_MIDDLE_CODE = #{lciMiddleCode} AND ( (#{lciSmallCode} IS NULL OR #{lciSmallCode} = '') AND (LCI_SMALL_CODE IS NULL OR LCI_SMALL_CODE = '') OR LCI_SMALL_CODE = #{lciSmallCode} ) ORDER BY MAJOR_CODE, SECTION_CODE, LAST_SAVED_AT DESC

SELECT CASE_ID AS "caseId", OWNER_ACTOR_ID AS "ownerActorId", DATASET_ID AS "datasetId", DATASET_NAME AS "datasetName", SECTION_CODE AS "sectionCode", SECTION_LABEL AS "sectionLabel", CASE_CODE AS "caseCode", MAJOR_CODE AS "majorCode", LCI_MAJOR_CODE AS "lciMajorCode", LCI_MAJOR_LABEL AS "lciMajorLabel", LCI_MIDDLE_CODE AS "lciMiddleCode", LCI_MIDDLE_LABEL AS "lciMiddleLabel", LCI_SMALL_CODE AS "lciSmallCode", LCI_SMALL_LABEL AS "lciSmallLabel", SOURCE_FILE_NM AS "sourceFileName", ROW_COUNT AS "rowCount", ROW_SCHEMA_JSON AS "rowSchemaJson", GUIDANCE_JSON AS "guidanceJson", TO_CHAR(LAST_SAVED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS "savedAt" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE WHERE OWNER_ACTOR_ID = #{ownerActorId} AND DATASET_ID = #{datasetId} ORDER BY MAJOR_CODE, SECTION_CODE, CASE_CODE

SELECT CASE_ROW_ID AS "caseRowId", CASE_ID AS "caseId", ROW_ORDR AS "rowOrder", ROW_KEY AS "rowKey", ROW_VALUES_JSON AS "rowValuesJson" FROM ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE_ROW WHERE CASE_ID = #{_parameter} AND USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY ROW_ORDR
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE ( CASE_ID, OWNER_ACTOR_ID, DATASET_ID, DATASET_NAME, SECTION_CODE, CASE_CODE, MAJOR_CODE, SECTION_LABEL, LCI_MAJOR_CODE, LCI_MAJOR_LABEL, LCI_MIDDLE_CODE, LCI_MIDDLE_LABEL, LCI_SMALL_CODE, LCI_SMALL_LABEL, SOURCE_FILE_NM, SOURCE_PATH, TARGET_PATH, CASE_STATUS, ROW_COUNT, ROW_SCHEMA_JSON, GUIDANCE_JSON, LAST_SAVED_BY, LAST_SAVED_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{caseId}, #{ownerActorId}, #{datasetId}, #{datasetName}, #{sectionCode}, #{caseCode}, #{majorCode}, #{sectionLabel}, #{lciMajorCode}, #{lciMajorLabel}, #{lciMiddleCode}, #{lciMiddleLabel}, #{lciSmallCode}, #{lciSmallLabel}, #{sourceFileName}, #{sourcePath}, #{targetPath}, #{caseStatus}, #{rowCount}, #{rowSchemaJson}, #{guidanceJson}, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, #{actorId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_CASE SET OWNER_ACTOR_ID = #{ownerActorId}, DATASET_ID = #{datasetId}, DATASET_NAME = #{datasetName}, MAJOR_CODE = #{majorCode}, SECTION_LABEL = #{sectionLabel}, LCI_MAJOR_CODE = #{lciMajorCode}, LCI_MAJOR_LABEL = #{lciMajorLabel}, LCI_MIDDLE_CODE = #{lciMiddleCode}, LCI_MIDDLE_LABEL = #{lciMiddleLabel}, LCI_SMALL_CODE = #{lciSmallCode}, LCI_SMALL_LABEL = #{lciSmallLabel}, SOURCE_FILE_NM = #{sourceFileName}, SOURCE_PATH = #{sourcePath}, TARGET_PATH = #{targetPath}, CASE_STATUS = #{caseStatus}, ROW_COUNT = #{rowCount}, ROW_SCHEMA_JSON = #{rowSchemaJson}, GUIDANCE_JSON = #{guidanceJson}, LAST_SAVED_BY = #{actorId}, LAST_SAVED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{actorId} WHERE CASE_ID = #{caseId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_EMISSION_SURVEY_UPLOAD_LOG ( LOG_ID, DATASET_ID, OWNER_ACTOR_ID, SOURCE_FILE_NM, LCI_MAJOR_CODE, LCI_MAJOR_LABEL, LCI_MIDDLE_CODE, LCI_MIDDLE_LABEL, LCI_SMALL_CODE, LCI_SMALL_LABEL, RESULT_STATUS, MESSAGE, SECTION_COUNT, ROW_COUNT, STORAGE_MODE, SECTION_RESULT_JSON, UPLOADED_AT ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{datasetId}, #{ownerActorId}, #{sourceFileName}, #{lciMajorCode}, #{lciMajorLabel}, #{lciMiddleCode}, #{lciMiddleLabel}, #{lciSmallCode}, #{lciSmallLabel}, #{resultStatus}, #{message}, #{sectionCount}, #{rowCount}, #{storageMode}, #{sectionResultJson}, CURRENT_DATETIME )
